RemediationStrings.Title: EnableScriptBlockLogging (Administrative Templates - Windows PowerShell)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging\EnableScriptBlockLogging must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Windows PowerShell.

RemediationStrings.Title: **del.EnableScriptBlockInvocationLogging (Administrative Templates - Windows PowerShell)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging\**del.EnableScriptBlockInvocationLogging must be . Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Windows PowerShell.
